---
subject: "Fred Smith, RIP"
from: "Marginal REVOLUTION <donotreply@wordpress.com>"
to: ""
date: 2025-06-22 21:10:55
labels: ["CATEGORY_PERSONAL", "INBOX", "Tyler Cowen", "UNREAD"]
label_ids: ["CATEGORY_PERSONAL", "INBOX", "Label_2466199532210586699", "UNREAD"]
---
He founded FedEx, a company that before the internet truly was a big deal. The plan for the company was [based on an undergraduate economics paper](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0dc9c6ac8c62b5fdef53d58eb7260dc1fbe86910b461fc93a16848a7fec444d0&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90944&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=a7f7b03f3d636d736340ca8366e78aed&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9Kb25fSGFydGxleV8vc3RhdHVzLzE5MzY4ODc2ODMyNTI3MDM2ODA&email_id=5487ff79e6cb1c81f46ff7e73a63c2f4). At age thirty [Fred was in deep trouble](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d9018dae439d22a618d51e0803b9ab650f729c98a03a25928faccd69a09d00c0&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90944&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f7d6d47cf5df46b6023151599eab8ee9&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9mb3VuZGVyc3BvZGNhc3Qvc3RhdHVzLzE5MzY4MzE2MTAzMzY1MDU4NjE/cz02MQ=&email_id=5487ff79e6cb1c81f46ff7e73a63c2f4). [And](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e7b7ce00a32702d214c28858dd841bc9a90406e1420c464113cd282e6dcc9c8b&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90944&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=98243aa70e24fffd9b411a98bed99bd7&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=5487ff79e6cb1c81f46ff7e73a63c2f4) "In the early days of FedEx, when the company was struggling financially, Smith took the company's last $5,000 to Las Vegas and played blackjack. He reportedly won $27,000, which was enough to cover an overdue fuel bill and keep the company afloat for another week."
Way back when, receiving a FedEx package was really a thrill.
